name: set_speed_grade
short_description: Set Timing Speed Grade and Temperature Grade
full_help:
set_speed_grade

Description: 
Set Timing Speed Grade and Temperature Grade

Syntax: 
set_speed_grade  [-temperature <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<value>]

Returns: 
string result

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-temperature]  Temperature grade used for timing analysis (Not available 
                  for 7 Series and earlier)
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<value>]       Speed grade used for timing analysis

Categories: 
Project
